with open\("/Users/vaibhavjadhav/Documents/Deonar tracking system/public/index.html", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find the positions
style_start = content.find\('<style>'\)
style_end = content.find\('</style>'\) + len\('</style>'\)
script_start = content.find\('\\n<script>'\)
script_end = content.rfind\('</script>'\) + len\('</script>'\)
body_end = content.rfind\('</body>'\)

print\(f"style_start: {style_start}"\)
print\(f"style_end: {style_end}"\)
print\(f"script_start: {script_start}"\)
print\(f"script_end: {script_end}"\)
print\(f"body_end: {body_end}"\)
print\(f"total length: {len\(content\)}"\)
PYEOF)

# Verify no <style> or <script> tags remain in index.html
with open\("/Users/vaibhavjadhav/Documents/Deonar tracking system/public/index.html", "r"\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Check for inline style/script blocks
import re
style_blocks = re.findall\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', content, re.DOTALL\)
script_blocks = re.findall\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>', content, re.DOTALL\)

print\("Inline style blocks found:", len\(style_blocks\)\)
for s in style_blocks[:3]:
    print\("  ->", s[:100]\)

print\("\\nScript tags found:", len\(script_blocks\)\)
for s in script_blocks:
    print\("  ->", s[:120]\)
PYEOF)
